markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Screening interview for the Managing Editor role at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/WytucAPbcUho1c2fhCsmw2zgERW3Ez5G?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Candidate Profile:** Igor Jankov (Proofed) has direct experience managing AI-generated content (CopyPress) and large-scale editorial workflows (1M words/mo).](https://fathom.video/share/WytucAPbcUho1c2fhCsmw2zgERW3Ez5G?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [**Core Philosophy:** Editorial quality hinges on clear style guides and iterative prompts, which prevent "AI-isms" like clichés and keyword stuffing.](https://fathom.video/share/WytucAPbcUho1c2fhCsmw2zgERW3Ez5G?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [**GrowthX Role:** The job is to build leverage by improving AI pipelines, not to perform manual edits. The goal is to shift from a 70% manual/30% prompt-engineering split to the reverse over time.](https://fathom.video/share/WytucAPbcUho1c2fhCsmw2zgERW3Ez5G?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
  - [**GrowthX Tech:** The company is building "Atlas," a unified platform for the full content lifecycle (production, analytics, opportunities) to replace its current tool stack (Notion, Airtable, Linear).](https://fathom.video/share/WytucAPbcUho1c2fhCsmw2zgERW3Ez5G?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)

## Topics

### Candidate Experience & Philosophy

  - [**Current Role:** Service Delivery Support at Proofed, managing editors, developing style guides, and performing QA.](https://fathom.video/share/WytucAPbcUho1c2fhCsmw2zgERW3Ez5G?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [**Core Belief:** Unclear style guides are the root cause of most editorial issues, whether for human editors or AI prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/WytucAPbcUho1c2fhCsmw2zgERW3Ez5G?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [**Quality Improvement Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/WytucAPbcUho1c2fhCsmw2zgERW3Ez5G?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
      - [Identifies underperforming editors via metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/WytucAPbcUho1c2fhCsmw2zgERW3Ez5G?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
      - [Analyzes their work for consistent issues.](https://fathom.video/share/WytucAPbcUho1c2fhCsmw2zgERW3Ez5G?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
      - [Provides targeted feedback and resources to correct process or knowledge gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/WytucAPbcUho1c2fhCsmw2zgERW3Ez5G?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)

### Project Examples & Scale

  - [**JPMorgan Chase (XML Training):**](https://fathom.video/share/WytucAPbcUho1c2fhCsmw2zgERW3Ez5G?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
      - [**Problem:** A 40-editor team was assigned a project editing XML manuals with no prior experience.](https://fathom.video/share/WytucAPbcUho1c2fhCsmw2zgERW3Ez5G?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
      - [**Solution:** Igor learned XML, created training materials, and ran rapid workshops to enable the team.](https://fathom.video/share/WytucAPbcUho1c2fhCsmw2zgERW3Ez5G?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
      - [**Outcome:** The project is ongoing, using Igor's original guides.](https://fathom.video/share/WytucAPbcUho1c2fhCsmw2zgERW3Ez5G?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [**Search Lab (AI Fact-Checking):**](https://fathom.video/share/WytucAPbcUho1c2fhCsmw2zgERW3Ez5G?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
      - [**Problem:** Editors were manually fact-checking specs in AI-generated car articles, which was slow and costly.](https://fathom.video/share/WytucAPbcUho1c2fhCsmw2zgERW3Ez5G?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
      - [**Solution:** Integrated Perplexity via Google Sheets and make.com to automate fact-checking, highlighting only data needing human review.](https://fathom.video/share/WytucAPbcUho1c2fhCsmw2zgERW3Ez5G?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [**Chinese Web Novels (Large-Scale Editing):**](https://fathom.video/share/WytucAPbcUho1c2fhCsmw2zgERW3Ez5G?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
      - [**Scale:** 1 million words/month.](https://fathom.video/share/WytucAPbcUho1c2fhCsmw2zgERW3Ez5G?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
      - [**Challenge:** Required editors to understand Chinese idioms, adapt content for a US audience, and maintain a sprawling character/plot database for continuity across 600+ chapters.](https://fathom.video/share/WytucAPbcUho1c2fhCsmw2zgERW3Ez5G?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)

### GrowthX Role & Philosophy

  - [**Primary Function:** Managing Editor (ME) manages content pipelines (AI writers), not people.](https://fathom.video/share/WytucAPbcUho1c2fhCsmw2zgERW3Ez5G?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
  - [**Key Metric:** Success is measured by building leverage and reducing manual work, not by the volume of edits made.](https://fathom.video/share/WytucAPbcUho1c2fhCsmw2zgERW3Ez5G?tab=summary&timestamp=929.0)
  - [**Workflow Evolution:** The role is expected to shift from a 70/30 manual-to-prompt split to the reverse as pipelines improve.](https://fathom.video/share/WytucAPbcUho1c2fhCsmw2zgERW3Ez5G?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
  - [**Core Task:** Prompt and context engineering to improve AI outputs.](https://fathom.video/share/WytucAPbcUho1c2fhCsmw2zgERW3Ez5G?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)
      - [**Prompt Engineering:** Direct instructions to the LLM.](https://fathom.video/share/WytucAPbcUho1c2fhCsmw2zgERW3Ez5G?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)
      - [**Context Engineering:** Providing representative examples (e.g., CTA formats) for the LLM to learn from.](https://fathom.video/share/WytucAPbcUho1c2fhCsmw2zgERW3Ez5G?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)

### GrowthX Team & Tech Stack

  - [**Team Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/WytucAPbcUho1c2fhCsmw2zgERW3Ez5G?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
      - [**ME:** Manages AI pipelines.](https://fathom.video/share/WytucAPbcUho1c2fhCsmw2zgERW3Ez5G?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
      - [**Engagement Manager:** Client-facing; develops strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/WytucAPbcUho1c2fhCsmw2zgERW3Ez5G?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)
      - [**Editorial Director:** Manages hiring, onboarding, and training.](https://fathom.video/share/WytucAPbcUho1c2fhCsmw2zgERW3Ez5G?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
  - [**Tech Stack:**](https://fathom.video/share/WytucAPbcUho1c2fhCsmw2zgERW3Ez5G?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
      - [**Current:** Notion, Airtable, Linear, SEMrush, PageRank.](https://fathom.video/share/WytucAPbcUho1c2fhCsmw2zgERW3Ez5G?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
      - [**Future:** "Atlas," a proprietary platform to unify the content lifecycle (production, analytics, opportunities) and replace the current tool stack.](https://fathom.video/share/WytucAPbcUho1c2fhCsmw2zgERW3Ez5G?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Matthew Panzarino:** Follow up with Igor Jankov regarding next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/WytucAPbcUho1c2fhCsmw2zgERW3Ez5G?tab=summary&timestamp=1442.0)
